name: O.r.'s Ranch Party Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 package Dry ranch salad dressing mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bag, place popcorn, crackers and pretzels.
2. Sprinkle the mixture with remaining ingredients except butter. Close the bag; shake gently to distribute evenly.
3. Drizzle mixture with melted butter. Quickly reclose the bag and shake until all ingredients are evenly coated.
4. Pour popcorn mixture onto a large baking sheet and spread evenly.
5. Bake at 300°F for 8 minutes.
6. Cool snack mixture to room temperature and serve.
7. Store in an airtight container.
